nodes.name: 棕眉柳莺
nodes.summary: 棕眉柳莺（Phylloscopus armandii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如棕眉柳莺。

nodes.name: Phylloscopus
nodes.summary: Phylloscopus（Phylloscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联80种鸟类，如Western Bonelli's warbler、Eastern Bonelli's warbler、橙斑翅柳莺等80种鸟类。

nodes.name: 棕眉柳莺
nodes.summary: The yellow-streaked warbler (Phylloscopus armandii) is a species of leaf warbler (family Phylloscopidae). It was formerly included in the "Old World warbler" assemblage. It breeds across much of China and migrates south to Yunnan and northern Southeast Asia. Its natural habitat is temperate forests. It has a variety of vocalizations, with dozens of syllable types. References
